private.description: Your owner-only browsing memory, observations, overlays, run logs, item indexes, and unreviewed action maps. Local by default; point it at your OWN private repo to sync the same memory across your machines and agents (see scopes/private/README.md).

public.description: Reviewed, reusable public site-action maps (Trello, Gmail, Docs, GitHub, LinkedIn, Calendar, …). Cloned from the public maps repo on first run; pull to update, or point this at your own public repo.
